SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.interfaces

Interface PrivilegedClientCI

All Superinterfaces:
fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.ComponentInterface, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.OfferedCI, PublishingCI, Remote, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.RequiredCI
All Known Implementing Classes:
BrokerPrivilegedInboundPort, ClientPrivilegedOutboundPort, PrivilegedConnector
public interface PrivilegedClientCI extends PublishingCI
The component interface PrivilegedClientCI declares the methods to be offered by a publication/subscription system to its privileged clients to manage the channels.

Description

Invariants

 invariant      true        // no more invariant

Created on : 2026-01-20

Author:
Jacques Malenfant

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    channelQuotaReached(String receptionPortURI)
    return true if the component registered under receptionPortURI has reached its channel quota.
    void
    createChannel(String receptionPortURI, String channel, String autorisedUsers)
    create a new channel of the given name with a set of users authorised to use it.
    void
    destroyChannel(String receptionPortURI, String channel)
    destroy the given channel when no more messages are currently waiting to be transmitted.
    void
    destroyChannelNow(String receptionPortURI, String channel)
    destroy the given channel immediately, even if the channel has still messages to be transmitted..
    boolean
    hasCreatedChannel(String receptionPortURI, String channel)
    return true if the component has created channel.
    void
    modifyAuthorisedUsers(String receptionPortURI, String channel, String autorisedUsers)
    replace the users authorised to use channel.

    Methods inherited from interface fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.interfaces.PublishingCI

    asyncPublishAndNotify, asyncPublishAndNotify, publish, publish

  • Method Details

    • hasCreatedChannel

      boolean hasCreatedChannel(String receptionPortURI, String channel) throws Exception
      return true if the component has created channel.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - channel to be tested.
      Returns:
      true if the component has created channel.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.

    • channelQuotaReached

      boolean channelQuotaReached(String receptionPortURI) throws Exception
      return true if the component registered under receptionPortURI has reached its channel quota.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      Returns:
      true if the component registered under receptionPortURI has reached its channel quota.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.

    • createChannel

      void createChannel(String receptionPortURI, String channel, String autorisedUsers) throws Exception
      create a new channel of the given name with a set of users authorised to use it.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    autorisedUsers == null || !autorisedUsers.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - identifier of the requesting component i.e., URI of its inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - name of the channel to be created.
      autorisedUsers - regular expression that matches the URIs of components that must be authorised to use the new channel.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.

    • modifyAuthorisedUsers

      void modifyAuthorisedUsers(String receptionPortURI, String channel, String autorisedUsers) throws Exception
      replace the users authorised to use channel.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    autorisedUsers != null && !autorisedUsers.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - identifier of the requesting component i.e., URI of its inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - name of the channel.
      autorisedUsers - regular expression that matches the URIs of components that must be authorised to use the new channel.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.

    • destroyChannel

      void destroyChannel(String receptionPortURI, String channel) throws Exception
      destroy the given channel when no more messages are currently waiting to be transmitted.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - name of the channel to be destroyed.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.

    • destroyChannelNow

      void destroyChannelNow(String receptionPortURI, String channel) throws Exception
      destroy the given channel immediately, even if the channel has still messages to be transmitted..

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - name of the channel to be destroyed.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.

Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa — Sorbonne Université, 2026
